aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a solid foundation for AI visibility but lacks structured content and authority signals to ensure AI models consistently cite them as a top choice.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common HVAC queries and solutions.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve local search presence.
Q&A section is inactive, missing opportunities for customer interaction and keyword optimization.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Expand citations to niche HVAC directories for added authority.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema for comprehensive local SEO.
FAQPage schema is present but lacks depth; more questions and answers should be added.
No HowTo schema to capture 'how to' queries related to HVAC services.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and DIY maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and media mentions to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks critical schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize them as the go-to HVAC experts.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing ground in voice and AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Phoenix Heating & Cooling
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants and answer engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the top choice for AI-driven HVAC queries.
